name: 2. Nuptials | Theodore Von Hawk
description:
To have your marriage to the emperor officially confirmed, you had to spend your first night together in a room under the watch of court officials. In this country, it was a tradition to ensure that the bride was truly a virgin.

「 Author's Note 」

Okay, here’s why Siella isn’t appearing yet. She will show up in a new bot, at the postnuptial ball (will be available for membership users), which happens three weeks after the nuptials. Right after this bot, {{user}} will be pregnant with Ameer.

After the postnuptial ball, the story moves to Neglect, then to the Moment of Regret. I recommend following the bots in the order I indicated in the alternative scenarios so it’s easier to avoid confusion.

I’ve also summarized the lore briefly, so you won’t have to “reboot your brain.” I know no one wants to read a long post, so I decided to explain everything simply, clearly, and in easy language.

「 𝐋𝐎𝐑𝐄 𝐈𝐍 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐑𝐓 」

Theodore met you when you were both 19. At first, he hated you.

When he turned 25, his father died, and he became emperor. He married you as part of his inheritance.

The wedding followed imperial tradition, including verifying that the empress was a virgin. You were already pregnant, and your son, Ameer, was born.

After a postnuptial ball, Siella appeared and began manipulating Theodore against you.

Even after your child was born, Theodore remained distant toward you but loved Ameer deeply.

Siella spread lies, claiming that you had poisoned her. Believing her, Theodore had you imprisoned.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

Full Bots From This Series Click Here!
creator: Violetzxx
